mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.avatar, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.last_login_ip, u.remark, u.dept_id, u.sort, u.create_time, d.dept_name, ur_agg.role_names FROM bc_sports_sys_user u LEFT JOIN bc_sports_sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ur.user_id, LISTAGG(r.role_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.role_name) as role_names FROM bc_sports_sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN bc_sports_sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 GROUP BY ur.user_id ) ur_agg ON ur_agg.user_id = u.id WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE '%' || #{queryUser.username} || '%'
AND u.nickname LIKE '%' || #{queryUser.nickname} || '%'
AND u.phone LIKE '%' || #{queryUser.phone} || '%'
AND u.status = #{queryUser.status}
AND u.dept_id = #{queryUser.deptId}
ORDER BY u.sort ASC, u.create_time DESC
